headline: Energy Transition Today - Expanding Solar Power: A New Era For Sustainable Energy
summary: Monarch Private Capital and Generate Capital have announced a significant development in the energy transition landscape with the closing of a 104 MW energy investment portfolio. This initiative supports over 15 community solar projects, aimed at delivering reliable and cost-effective energy without additional infrastructure burdens. The projects are expected to generate the equivalent electricity needed to power over 20,000 U.S. homes, while avoiding 150,000 metric tons of carbon dioxide...

headline: ‘Big Short’ investor Steve Eisman: I don't have a problem with the market right now
summary: Steve Eisman, ‘The Real Eisman Playbook’ podcast host and former Neuberger senior portfolio manager, joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss the state of the economy, latest market trends, state of private credit, and more.

headline: Something Amazing That No One Predicted Just Happened in the Markets (Yes, AI Is at the Center of It)
summary: Former General Electric investors are extremely happy with two of the companies that emerged from the breakup.
